net: don't ignore getsockname errors in newFileFD  newFileFD is called when creating a net FD from an existing socket handle. That socket might not be bound yet, in which case getsockname returns a useful error that is currently ignored and replaced with a potentially misleading EPROTONOSUPPORT erro
